feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Pour conquérir Mars, les humains devront surmonter 5 obstacles colossaux

link.title: Pour conquérir Mars, les humains devront surmonter 5 obstacles colossaux

entry.content:
La Nasa s’apprête à lancer son rover Perseverance en direction de Mars. Mais les humains fouleront-ils aussi, un jour, le sol de la planète rouge ? Francis Rocard, astrophysicien au Centre national d’études spatiales (Cnes) et auteur chez Flammarion des “Dernières Nouvelles de Mars”, présente devant notre caméra 5 grands obstacles à franchir pour voyager jusqu’à notre voisine, atterrir à sa surface, y survivre.… et en repartir.
Retrouver toute l’actualité, les reportages, les enquêtes, les opinions et les débats de "L’Obs" sur notre site :
entry.summary: La Nasa s’apprête à lancer son rover Perseverance en direction de Mars. Mais les humains fouleront-ils aussi, un jour, le sol de la planète rouge ? Francis Rocard, astrophysicien au Centre national d’études spatiales (Cnes) et auteur chez Flammarion des “Dernières Nouvelles de Mars”, présente devant notre caméra 5 grands obstacles à franchir pour voyager jusqu’à notre voisine, atterrir à sa surface, y survivre.… et en repartir. Retrouver toute l’actualité, les reportages, les enquêtes, les opinions et les débats de "L’Obs" sur notre site :

entry.title: CanBeat 3:60 Challenge - Episode 1 - Feat. Candy Rookies Allie, Raffy, and Sofia

link.title: CanBeat 3:60 Challenge - Episode 1 - Feat. Candy Rookies Allie, Raffy, and Sofia

entry.content:
It’s the first episode of the CanBeat 3/60 Challenge! This week, we’re having Candy Rookies Allie, Raffy, and Sofia in a round of song challenge! Who’s going to take home this week’s crown?
CanBeat 3/60 Challenge is a new series where three players battle in different challenges under 60 seconds to become the episode’s CanBeat Contender. The previous episode’s winner will get to join a new set of contenders in the next episode to defend their crown. Wanna become a contender? Stay tuned for a chance to join!
entry.summary: It’s the first episode of the CanBeat 3/60 Challenge! This week, we’re having Candy Rookies Allie, Raffy, and Sofia in a round of song challenge! Who’s going to take home this week’s crown? CanBeat 3/60 Challenge is a new series where three players battle in different challenges under 60 seconds to become the episode’s CanBeat Contender. The previous episode’s winner will get to join a new set of contenders in the next episode to defend their crown. Wanna become a contender? Stay tuned for a chance to join!

entry.title: Nonstop- COVID-19 cases in India crosses 12 Lakh mark

link.title: Nonstop- COVID-19 cases in India crosses 12 Lakh mark

entry.content: India hard hit by a deadly novel coronavirus. India COVID count worlds third highest. In the last 24 hours, nearly 38 thousand COVID cases have been reported with 648 deaths. The death toll in India surpasses the mark of 28 thousand. More than 7.5 lakh has been recovered. Maharashtra remains the worst-hit due to the virus. Maharashtra COVID cases cross the mark of 3 lakh 37 thousand. Watch the Nonstop 100 to know more.
entry.summary: India hard hit by a deadly novel coronavirus. India COVID count worlds third highest. In the last 24 hours, nearly 38 thousand COVID cases have been reported with 648 deaths. The death toll in India surpasses the mark of 28 thousand. More than 7.5 lakh has been recovered. Maharashtra remains the worst-hit due to the virus. Maharashtra COVID cases cross the mark of 3 lakh 37 thousand. Watch the Nonstop 100 to know more.

entry.title: BLANCHE-NEIGE LES SOULIERS ROUGES ET LES 7 NAINS

link.title: BLANCHE-NEIGE LES SOULIERS ROUGES ET LES 7 NAINS

entry.content:
BLANCHE-NEIGE LES SOULIERS ROUGES ET LES 7 NAINS - Spot Découvrez la nouvelle Blanche-Neige, au cinéma le 29 juillet !
Des princes transformés en nains viennent à l’aide d’une princesse dont la beauté est cachée dans ses souliers. Ici, le conte de fées s’amuse de notre obsession du paraître. Mais comme dans tous les contes, c’est l’amour qui sauvera tous les personnages.
entry.summary: BLANCHE-NEIGE LES SOULIERS ROUGES ET LES 7 NAINS - Spot Découvrez la nouvelle Blanche-Neige, au cinéma le 29 juillet ! Des princes transformés en nains viennent à l’aide d’une princesse dont la beauté est cachée dans ses souliers. Ici, le conte de fées s’amuse de notre obsession du paraître. Mais comme dans tous les contes, c’est l’amour qui sauvera tous les personnages.

Jean Castex annonce un renforcement des mesures sanitaires dans les aéroports.

entry.title: GTA 5 Bank Robbery Gameplay (60 FPS)

link.title: GTA 5 Bank Robbery Gameplay (60 FPS)

entry.content:
Grand Theft Auto (GTA) is a series of action-adventure games created by David Jones and Mike Dailly.[2] Later titles were developed under the oversight of brothers Dan and Sam Houser, Leslie Benzies and Aaron Garbut. It is primarily developed by British development house Rockstar North (formerly DMA Design), and published by its parent company, Rockstar Games. The name of the series references the term "grand theft auto", used in the United States for motor vehicle theft.
Most games in the series are set in fictional locales modelled on cities, usually either Liberty City, Vice City or San Andreas, which are stand-ins for New York City, Miami and the state of California, respectively. The first game encompassed three fictional cities, while subsequent titles tend to emphasise a single setting. Gameplay focuses on an open world where the player can choose missions to progress an overall story, as well as engaging in side activities, all consisting of action-adventure, driving, third-person shooting, carjacking, occasional role-playing, stealth and racing elements. The series focuses on many different protagonists who attempt to rise through the ranks of the criminal underworld, although their motives for doing so vary in each game. The series also has elements of the earlier beat ‘em up games from the 16-bit era. The antagonists are commonly characters who have betrayed the protagonist or his organisation, or characters who have the most impact impeding the protagonist’s progress. Film and music veterans have voiced characters, including Ray Liotta, Dennis Hopper, Samuel L. Jackson, James Woods, Debbie Harry, Axl Rose and Peter Fonda.[3]
DMA Design began the series in 1997, with the release of the Grand Theft Auto. As of 2019, the series has eleven stand-alone games and four expansion packs. The third main title, Grand Theft Auto III, is considered a landmark game, as it brought the series to a three-dimensional (3D) setting and more immersive experience. Subsequent titles have followed and built upon the concept established in Grand Theft Auto III, and received significant acclaim. They have influenced other open-world action games, and led to the label Grand Theft Auto clone on similar games.
The series has been critically acclaimed and commercially successful, having shipped more than 280 million units with an estimated gross revenue of over $9 billion.[4][5] Making it the fourth-highest selling video game franchise of all time, behind Nintendo’s Mario and Pokémon franchises,[6] and Tetris.[7] In 2006, Grand Theft Auto was featured in a list of British design icons in the Great British Design Quest organised by the BBC and the Design Museum.[8] In 2013, The Telegraph ranked Grand Theft Auto among Britain’s most successful exports.[9] The series has also been controversial for its adult nature and violent themes.
entry.summary: Grand Theft Auto (GTA) is a series of action-adventure games created by David Jones and Mike Dailly.[2] Later titles were developed under the oversight of brothers Dan and Sam Houser, Leslie Benzies and Aaron Garbut. It is primarily developed by British development house Rockstar North (formerly DMA Design), and published by its parent company, Rockstar Games. The name of the series references the term "grand theft auto", used in the United States for motor vehicle theft. Most games in the series are set in fictional locales modelled on cities, usually either Liberty City, Vice City or San Andreas, which are stand-ins for New York City, Miami and the state of California, respectively. The first game encompassed three fictional cities, while subsequent titles tend to emphasise a single setting. Gameplay focuses on an open world where the player can choose missions to progress an overall story, as well as engaging in side activities, all consisting of action-adventure, driving, third-person shooting, carjacking, occasional role-playing, stealth and racing elements. The series focuses on many different protagonists who attempt to rise through the ranks of the criminal underworld, although their motives for doing so vary in each game. The series also has elements of the earlier beat ‘em up games from the 16-bit era. The antagonists are commonly characters who have betrayed the protagonist or his organisation, or characters who have the most impact impeding the protagonist’s progress. Film and music veterans have voiced characters, including Ray Liotta, Dennis Hopper, Samuel L. Jackson, James Woods, Debbie Harry, Axl Rose and Peter Fonda.[3] DMA Design began the series in 1997, with the release of the Grand Theft Auto. As of 2019, the series has eleven stand-alone games and four expansion packs. The third main title, Grand Theft Auto III, is considered a landmark game, as it brought the series to a three-dimensional (3D) setting and more immersive experience. Subsequent titles have followed and built upon the concept established in Grand Theft Auto III, and received significant acclaim. They have influenced other open-world action games, and led to the label Grand Theft Auto clone on similar games. The series has been critically acclaimed and commercially successful, having shipped more than 280 million units with an estimated gross revenue of over $9 billion.[4][5] Making it the fourth-highest selling video game franchise of all time, behind Nintendo’s Mario and Pokémon franchises,[6] and Tetris.[7] In 2006, Grand Theft Auto was featured in a list of British design icons in the Great British Design Quest organised by the BBC and the Design Museum.[8] In 2013, The Telegraph ranked Grand Theft Auto among Britain’s most successful exports.[9] The series has also been controversial for its adult nature and violent themes.

entry.title: Été : la nouvelle jeunesse des cahiers de vacances

link.title: Été : la nouvelle jeunesse des cahiers de vacances

entry.content:
Depuis longtemps, les cahiers de vacances ont trouvé leur place dans les valises de vacances. Cette année, après le confinement et les trois mois d’école à la maison, ils connaissent un grand succès.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Depuis longtemps, les cahiers de vacances ont trouvé leur place dans les valises de vacances. Cette année, après le confinement et les trois mois d’école à la maison, ils connaissent un grand succès. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Komisi X DPR akan Panggil Nadiem Makarim, Bahas Permasalahan Ini!

link.title: Komisi X DPR akan Panggil Nadiem Makarim, Bahas Permasalahan Ini!

entry.content:
KOMPAS.TV - Komisi X DPR dalam waktu dekat akan memanggil Menteri Pendidikan dan Kebudayaan Nadiem Makarim terkait polemik Program Organisasi Penggerak Kemendikbud.
Ketua komisi X DPR Syaiful Huda, meminta kemendikbud untuk menata ulang program organisasi penggerak.
Kemendikbud harus mencari skema terbaik, agar program organisasi penggerak tidak menimbulkan polemik.
Komisi X juga ingin agar NU, Muhammadiyah, dan PGRI untuk masuk kembali ke program ini.
Pasca mundurnya Muhammadiyah, NU dan PGRI dari program organisasi penggerak Kemendikbud, atau POP Kemendikbud, Mendikbud Nadiem Makarim menyatakan, kementeriannya akan melakukan evaluasi terkait program ini, terutama di sektor seleksi organisasi yang dipilih sebagai penerima dana.
Menteri nadiem menambahkan, dirinya menerima kritik dari masyarakat, dan menegaskan bahwa gagasan dari program ini adalah untuk memaksimalkan inovasi sistem belajar mengajar yang lebih baik, yang berasal dari para pelaku dunia pendidikan di Tanah Air.
Sebelumnya, POP Kemendikbud mendapat kritik keras dari Muhammadiyah, organisasi yang secara turun temurun berkecimpung di dunia pendidikan Indonesia.
Dalam program Kompas Petang, Ketua Umum Pemuda Muhammadiyah, Sunanto menilai dana ratusan miliar dari POP Kemendikbud ada yang tidak tepat sasaran, karena diduga ada korporasi besar yang ikut menerima dana POP.
Muhammadiyah pun mundur meski mendapat bagian kategori gajah atau 20 miliar.
Program organisasi penggerak kemendikbud, atau POP Kemendikbud menganggarkan dana 595 miliar rupiah, yang akan diberikan untuk 156 ormas terpilih.
Ormas terpilih itu dibagi menjadi 3 kategori, yakni gajah untuk dana 20 miliar rupiah.
Macan, 5 miliar rupiah, kategori kijang dengan besaran dana 1 miliar rupiah.
Solusi tentu saja dibutuhkan agar kisruh dana POP Kemendikbud bisa segera selesai, dan uangnya bisa optimal dirasakan para pelaku pendidikan, terutama peserta didik, terlebih di masa pandemi saat ini.
entry.summary: KOMPAS.TV - Komisi X DPR dalam waktu dekat akan memanggil Menteri Pendidikan dan Kebudayaan Nadiem Makarim terkait polemik Program Organisasi Penggerak Kemendikbud. Ketua komisi X DPR Syaiful Huda, meminta kemendikbud untuk menata ulang program organisasi penggerak. Kemendikbud harus mencari skema terbaik, agar program organisasi penggerak tidak menimbulkan polemik. Komisi X juga ingin agar NU, Muhammadiyah, dan PGRI untuk masuk kembali ke program ini. Pasca mundurnya Muhammadiyah, NU dan PGRI dari program organisasi penggerak Kemendikbud, atau POP Kemendikbud, Mendikbud Nadiem Makarim menyatakan, kementeriannya akan melakukan evaluasi terkait program ini, terutama di sektor seleksi organisasi yang dipilih sebagai penerima dana. Menteri nadiem menambahkan, dirinya menerima kritik dari masyarakat, dan menegaskan bahwa gagasan dari program ini adalah untuk memaksimalkan inovasi sistem belajar mengajar yang lebih baik, yang berasal dari para pelaku dunia pendidikan di Tanah Air. Sebelumnya, POP Kemendikbud mendapat kritik keras dari Muhammadiyah, organisasi yang secara turun temurun berkecimpung di dunia pendidikan Indonesia. Dalam program Kompas Petang, Ketua Umum Pemuda Muhammadiyah, Sunanto menilai dana ratusan miliar dari POP Kemendikbud ada yang tidak tepat sasaran, karena diduga ada korporasi besar yang ikut menerima dana POP. Muhammadiyah pun mundur meski mendapat bagian kategori gajah atau 20 miliar. Program organisasi penggerak kemendikbud, atau POP Kemendikbud menganggarkan dana 595 miliar rupiah, yang akan diberikan untuk 156 ormas terpilih. Ormas terpilih itu dibagi menjadi 3 kategori, yakni gajah untuk dana 20 miliar rupiah. Macan, 5 miliar rupiah, kategori kijang dengan besaran dana 1 miliar rupiah. Solusi tentu saja dibutuhkan agar kisruh dana POP Kemendikbud bisa segera selesai, dan uangnya bisa optimal dirasakan para pelaku pendidikan, terutama peserta didik, terlebih di masa pandemi saat ini.

entry.title: Greeks defy social distancing by moshing at hard-rock festival

link.title: Greeks defy social distancing by moshing at hard-rock festival

entry.content:
Huge crowds of young people ignored COVID-19 precautions and slamdance into each other during a music festival in Greece on Saturday (July 25).
Chairs flew at a rock concert in Greece as spectators danced en masse, removing seats put in place in order to maintain to maintain social distancing.
Thousands attended the hard-rock Long Beach Festival in Pieria, Greece, which featured bands such as Rotting Christ, Planet of Zeus and Thrax Punks.
All spectators were screened with a contactless thermometer at the entrance gate and audience seats were spaced out.
Τhe situation quickly changed and the rules were circumvented as passionate fans began to flock in front of the stage, which turned into a mosh pit.
entry.summary: Huge crowds of young people ignored COVID-19 precautions and slamdance into each other during a music festival in Greece on Saturday (July 25). Chairs flew at a rock concert in Greece as spectators danced en masse, removing seats put in place in order to maintain to maintain social distancing. Thousands attended the hard-rock Long Beach Festival in Pieria, Greece, which featured bands such as Rotting Christ, Planet of Zeus and Thrax Punks. All spectators were screened with a contactless thermometer at the entrance gate and audience seats were spaced out. Τhe situation quickly changed and the rules were circumvented as passionate fans began to flock in front of the stage, which turned into a mosh pit.

entry.title: Amber Heard BLAMES Johnny Depp for everything! Then ADMITS she has issues!

link.title: Amber Heard BLAMES Johnny Depp for everything! Then ADMITS she has issues!

entry.content: Day 12 of Johnny Depp Vs The Sun has finished, and once again Amber Heard spent most of the day on the witness stand. She was once again caught making up several things, and dismantled by Depp’s legal team.
entry.summary: Day 12 of Johnny Depp Vs The Sun has finished, and once again Amber Heard spent most of the day on the witness stand. She was once again caught making up several things, and dismantled by Depp’s legal team.

entry.title: Passengers injured as US fighter jet comes close to Iranian plane Oneindia Malayalma

link.title: Passengers injured as US fighter jet comes close to Iranian plane Oneindia Malayalma

entry.content: ഇറാനിയന്‍ വിമാനവും യു.എസ് യുദ്ധവിമാനവും തമ്മില്‍ കൂട്ടിമുട്ടലിന്റെ വക്കിലെത്തിയതായി റിപ്പോര്‍ട്ട്.സിറിയന്‍ വ്യോമപാതയിലൂടെ സഞ്ചരിക്കുകയായിരുന്ന ഇറാനിയന്‍ വിമാനത്തിന് മുകളിലൂടെ രണ്ട് അമേരിക്കന്‍ യുദ്ധ വിമാനങ്ങള്‍ (യുഎസ് എഫ് -15) സഞ്ചരിച്ചതായി ഇറാന്‍. ഇതേ തുടര്‍ന്ന് രണ്ട് യാത്രക്കാര്‍ക്ക് പരുക്കേറ്റു.
entry.summary: ഇറാനിയന്‍ വിമാനവും യു.എസ് യുദ്ധവിമാനവും തമ്മില്‍ കൂട്ടിമുട്ടലിന്റെ വക്കിലെത്തിയതായി റിപ്പോര്‍ട്ട്.സിറിയന്‍ വ്യോമപാതയിലൂടെ സഞ്ചരിക്കുകയായിരുന്ന ഇറാനിയന്‍ വിമാനത്തിന് മുകളിലൂടെ രണ്ട് അമേരിക്കന്‍ യുദ്ധ വിമാനങ്ങള്‍ (യുഎസ് എഫ് -15) സഞ്ചരിച്ചതായി ഇറാന്‍. ഇതേ തുടര്‍ന്ന് രണ്ട് യാത്രക്കാര്‍ക്ക് പരുക്കേറ്റു.

entry.title: Assam Flood: बाढ़ और भूस्खलन से 107 लोगों की मौत, PM Modi ने CM Sonowal से की बात वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Assam Flood: बाढ़ और भूस्खलन से 107 लोगों की मौत, PM Modi ने CM Sonowal से की बात वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Sunday assured all support to Assam in dealing with the flood havoc, which has claimed 81 lives and affected over 54 lakh in 30 districts. PM Narendra Modi spoke with Assam Chief Minister Sarbananda Sonowal about the flood situation in the state and expressed solidarity with the people.Watch video,
कोरोना संकट के बीच असम के लोगों को दोहरी मार झेलनी पड़ रही है. एक तरफ कोरोना संकट तो दूसरी तरफ बाढ़. असम में बाढ़ भयावह रूप ले चुकी है.बाढ़ जनित घटनाओं में 2 और लोगों की मौत हो गई जिससे इस प्राकृतिक आपदा के कारण मरने वाले लोगों की संख्या 107 हो गई है. इनमें से बाढ़ के चलते 81 लोगों की जान जा चुकी है. वहीं भूस्खलन के चलते 26 की मौत गई है. देखें वीडियो
#AssamFlood #NarendraModi #SarbanandaSonowal
entry.summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Sunday assured all support to Assam in dealing with the flood havoc, which has claimed 81 lives and affected over 54 lakh in 30 districts. PM Narendra Modi spoke with Assam Chief Minister Sarbananda Sonowal about the flood situation in the state and expressed solidarity with the people.Watch video, कोरोना संकट के बीच असम के लोगों को दोहरी मार झेलनी पड़ रही है. एक तरफ कोरोना संकट तो दूसरी तरफ बाढ़. असम में बाढ़ भयावह रूप ले चुकी है.बाढ़ जनित घटनाओं में 2 और लोगों की मौत हो गई जिससे इस प्राकृतिक आपदा के कारण मरने वाले लोगों की संख्या 107 हो गई है. इनमें से बाढ़ के चलते 81 लोगों की जान जा चुकी है. वहीं भूस्खलन के चलते 26 की मौत गई है. देखें वीडियो #AssamFlood #NarendraModi #SarbanandaSonowal

entry.title: Rastreadores voluntarios, nuevo arma en EEUU contra el coronavirus

link.title: Rastreadores voluntarios, nuevo arma en EEUU contra el coronavirus

entry.content: Con ayuda de una aplicación web más de un millar de voluntarios rastrea desde hace un mes los contactos de contagiados de COVID-19 en el sur de Florida, "antes de que la enfermedad vuelva a encerrarnos a todos", según dice a Efe Jack Michel, el médico responsable de la iniciativa. Fuente: EFE
entry.summary: Con ayuda de una aplicación web más de un millar de voluntarios rastrea desde hace un mes los contactos de contagiados de COVID-19 en el sur de Florida, "antes de que la enfermedad vuelva a encerrarnos a todos", según dice a Efe Jack Michel, el médico responsable de la iniciativa. Fuente: EFE

entry.title: Musti - Thorns and quills - Episode 6 - Cartoon for kids

link.title: Musti - Thorns and quills - Episode 6 - Cartoon for kids

entry.content:
SUBSCRIBE: – Kedoo Animations is the place of the most amazing short animations & toons from studios worldwide!
When Musti helps Daddy water the flowers in the garden, he accidentally sprinkles Mrs Hedgehog. Musti shows Mrs Hedgehog around the flowers in the garden. When they come to the roses, Musti goes off to ask Daddy if he can pick some. Roses have thorns… as Mr Rabbit soon discovers!
See also:
All episodes of Booba ►
Adventure of Om Nom ►
New episodes of Oko and Lele ►
Most popular episodes of Beo n Peno ►
Cartoons for kids Musti ►
Join us and enjoy our funny cartoons for babies and kids.
New series and episodes every week!
Get Social with Kedoo Animations:
Like us on Facebook ►
Follow us on Twitter ►
entry.summary: SUBSCRIBE: – Kedoo Animations is the place of the most amazing short animations & toons from studios worldwide! When Musti helps Daddy water the flowers in the garden, he accidentally sprinkles Mrs Hedgehog. Musti shows Mrs Hedgehog around the flowers in the garden. When they come to the roses, Musti goes off to ask Daddy if he can pick some. Roses have thorns… as Mr Rabbit soon discovers! See also: All episodes of Booba ► Adventure of Om Nom ► New episodes of Oko and Lele ► Most popular episodes of Beo n Peno ► Cartoons for kids Musti ► Join us and enjoy our funny cartoons for babies and kids. New series and episodes every week! Get Social with Kedoo Animations: Like us on Facebook ► Follow us on Twitter ►

entry.title: Privatisation of Banks : Modi Govt Plans To Reduce Number Of Public Sector Banks In India

link.title: Privatisation of Banks : Modi Govt Plans To Reduce Number Of Public Sector Banks In India

entry.content:
India is looking to privatise more than half of its state-owned banks to reduce the number of government-owned lenders to just five as part of an overhaul of the banking industry, government and banking sources said.
#PrivatisationofBanks
#PSBBanks
#PMModi
#StateOwnedBanks
#BanksInIndia
#IndianOverseasBank
#UCOBank
#BankofMaharashtra
#PunjabandSindBank
కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం గతంలోనే బ్యాంకుల విలీన ప్రక్రియకు తెరతీసింది. అయితే ఇంకా ఆప్రక్రియ పూర్తి కాలేదు. మోదీ సర్కార్ మరిన్ని ప్రభుత్వ బ్యాంకులను ప్రైవేటీకరించాలని యోచిస్తోంది. ఈసారి బ్యాంకులను విలీనం చేయకుండా.. సగానికి పైగా ప్రభుత్వ బ్యాంకుల్లో వాటాలను విక్రయించాలని భావిస్తోంది.
entry.summary: India is looking to privatise more than half of its state-owned banks to reduce the number of government-owned lenders to just five as part of an overhaul of the banking industry, government and banking sources said. #PrivatisationofBanks #PSBBanks #PMModi #StateOwnedBanks #BanksInIndia #IndianOverseasBank #UCOBank #BankofMaharashtra #PunjabandSindBank కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం గతంలోనే బ్యాంకుల విలీన ప్రక్రియకు తెరతీసింది. అయితే ఇంకా ఆప్రక్రియ పూర్తి కాలేదు. మోదీ సర్కార్ మరిన్ని ప్రభుత్వ బ్యాంకులను ప్రైవేటీకరించాలని యోచిస్తోంది. ఈసారి బ్యాంకులను విలీనం చేయకుండా.. సగానికి పైగా ప్రభుత్వ బ్యాంకుల్లో వాటాలను విక్రయించాలని భావిస్తోంది.

entry.title: Jonathan Cohen : « J’ai besoin de sortir du cadre »

link.title: Jonathan Cohen : « J’ai besoin de sortir du cadre »

entry.content: Il a été révélé en roi de l’impro avec son personnage de Serge le Mytho sur Canal +.Jonathan Cohen, 40 ans, est aujourd’hui une valeur montante de la nouvelle scène française.Décalé, osé, parfois scabreux mais toujours drôle.Chacune de ses apparitions à l’écran déclenche le rire.De la plus petite dans "Tout simplement noir", déjà en salles.aux rôles secondaires de "Terrible Jungle", sur les écrans mercredi.Ça fait quoi de tourner avec Catherine Deneuve ?.Elle est overblagueuse, le tournage a été une partie de rigolade. Une sorte de rigolade classe car je la vouvoyais, comme tout le monde. , Jonathan Cohen, le JDD.Est-il vrai que vous avez repris la cigarette à cause d’elle ?.J’avais arrêté depuis un an, mais elle a une façon de fumer tellement stylée que c’était dur de résister, Jonathan Cohen, le JDD.Quels sont les rôles dont vous ne voulez plus ?.Le meilleur pote, c’est fini, goodbye ! Je veux aller vers d’autres énergies, un peu moins explosives. , Jonathan Cohen, le JDD
entry.summary: Il a été révélé en roi de l’impro avec son personnage de Serge le Mytho sur Canal +.Jonathan Cohen, 40 ans, est aujourd’hui une valeur montante de la nouvelle scène française.Décalé, osé, parfois scabreux mais toujours drôle.Chacune de ses apparitions à l’écran déclenche le rire.De la plus petite dans "Tout simplement noir", déjà en salles.aux rôles secondaires de "Terrible Jungle", sur les écrans mercredi.Ça fait quoi de tourner avec Catherine Deneuve ?.Elle est overblagueuse, le tournage a été une partie de rigolade. Une sorte de rigolade classe car je la vouvoyais, comme tout le monde. , Jonathan Cohen, le JDD.Est-il vrai que vous avez repris la cigarette à cause d’elle ?.J’avais arrêté depuis un an, mais elle a une façon de fumer tellement stylée que c’était dur de résister, Jonathan Cohen, le JDD.Quels sont les rôles dont vous ne voulez plus ?.Le meilleur pote, c’est fini, goodbye ! Je veux aller vers d’autres énergies, un peu moins explosives. , Jonathan Cohen, le JDD

entry.title: DGCA Extends Domestic Flight Restrictions, Continue Till November 24 Oneindia Telugu

link.title: DGCA Extends Domestic Flight Restrictions, Continue Till November 24 Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
The civil aviation ministry today extended the restrictions on domestic flights till November 24 or until further notice in the view of COVID-19 pandemic. The cap on airfares will remain in effect till the same period.
#flights
#Internationalflights
#Domesticflights
#DGCA
#flightsresumeindia
#domesticflightsbooking
#IRCTCAir
#civilaviation
#civilaviationministry
#flightsbooking
#airtransport
#airportsauthorityofIndia
#airlines
#centralgovernment
#HardeepSinghPuri
#india
#lockdown
దేశంలో కరోనా వైరస్ వ్యాప్తి ఇప్పటికీ కంట్రోల్ లోకి రాకపోవడంతో దేశీ విమాన సర్వీసులపై పౌర విమానయాన శాఖ కీలక నిర్ణయం తీసుకుంది. నవంబర్ 24 వరకు అన్ని రకాల సర్వీసులను రద్దు చేస్తున్నట్లు, అదే సమయంలో దేశీయ విమాన ఛార్జీలపై గ‌తంలో విధించిన నియంత్ర‌ణ ఆగస్టు 24 వరకు కొన‌సాగిస్తున్నట్లు డైరెక్టర్ జనరల్ ఆఫ్ సివిల్ ఏవియేషన్(డీజీసీఏ) శుక్రవారం ప్రకటన చేసింది.
entry.summary: The civil aviation ministry today extended the restrictions on domestic flights till November 24 or until further notice in the view of COVID-19 pandemic. The cap on airfares will remain in effect till the same period. #flights #Internationalflights #Domesticflights #DGCA #flightsresumeindia #domesticflightsbooking #IRCTCAir #civilaviation #civilaviationministry #flightsbooking #airtransport #airportsauthorityofIndia #airlines #centralgovernment #HardeepSinghPuri #india #lockdown దేశంలో కరోనా వైరస్ వ్యాప్తి ఇప్పటికీ కంట్రోల్ లోకి రాకపోవడంతో దేశీ విమాన సర్వీసులపై పౌర విమానయాన శాఖ కీలక నిర్ణయం తీసుకుంది. నవంబర్ 24 వరకు అన్ని రకాల సర్వీసులను రద్దు చేస్తున్నట్లు, అదే సమయంలో దేశీయ విమాన ఛార్జీలపై గ‌తంలో విధించిన నియంత్ర‌ణ ఆగస్టు 24 వరకు కొన‌సాగిస్తున్నట్లు డైరెక్టర్ జనరల్ ఆఫ్ సివిల్ ఏవియేషన్(డీజీసీఏ) శుక్రవారం ప్రకటన చేసింది.

entry.title: Warga di Pinrang Ditabrak Saat Galang Dana

link.title: Warga di Pinrang Ditabrak Saat Galang Dana

entry.content: VIVA – Seorang pria di Kabupaten Pinrang, Sulawesi Selatan (Sulsel), Bahtiar alias Tiar, ditabrak pemotor saat tengah melakukan penggalangan dana untuk bantuan korban banjir di Masamba, Luwu Utara. Tiar menggalang dana sembari berjoget di badan jalan. Momen Tiar tertabrak pemotor saat tengah berjoget di badan jalan itu terekam video berdurasi 59 detik dan viral di media sosial. Tiar yang menggunakan kaus hijau terang lengan panjang, tengah berjoget bersama beberapa rekannya dengan iringan musik. Tiar sedang asyik berjoget seketika ditabrak pemotor sehingga tersungkur bersama pemotor yang menabraknya. Rekan-rekan Tiar kemudian langsung menolong Tiar yang sudah terbaring di aspal.
entry.summary: VIVA – Seorang pria di Kabupaten Pinrang, Sulawesi Selatan (Sulsel), Bahtiar alias Tiar, ditabrak pemotor saat tengah melakukan penggalangan dana untuk bantuan korban banjir di Masamba, Luwu Utara. Tiar menggalang dana sembari berjoget di badan jalan. Momen Tiar tertabrak pemotor saat tengah berjoget di badan jalan itu terekam video berdurasi 59 detik dan viral di media sosial. Tiar yang menggunakan kaus hijau terang lengan panjang, tengah berjoget bersama beberapa rekannya dengan iringan musik. Tiar sedang asyik berjoget seketika ditabrak pemotor sehingga tersungkur bersama pemotor yang menabraknya. Rekan-rekan Tiar kemudian langsung menolong Tiar yang sudah terbaring di aspal.
